# warbleR: Streamline Bioacoustic Analysis

🌐 **Languages:**

[অসমীয়া](https://openaitx.github.io/view.html?user=maRce10&project=warbleR&lang=as)

![warbleR logo](reference/figures/warbleR_sticker.png)

[warbleR](https://cran.r-project.org/package=warbleR) is intended to
facilitate the analysis of the structure of animal acoustic signals in
R. Users can collect open-access avian recordings or enter their own
data into a workflow that facilitates spectrographic visualization and
measurement of acoustic parameters.
[warbleR](https://cran.r-project.org/package=warbleR) makes use of the
fundamental sound analysis tools of the seewave package, and offers new
tools for acoustic structure analysis. These tools are available for
batch analysis of acoustic signals.

The main features of the package are:

- Diverse tools for measuring acoustic structure
- The use of loops to apply tasks through acoustic signals referenced in
  a selection table
- The production of images in the working directory with spectrograms to
  allow users organize data and verify acoustic analyses

The package offers functions to:

- Explore and download [Xeno‐Canto](https://xeno-canto.org/) recordings
- Explore, organize and manipulate multiple sound files
- Detect signals automatically (in frequency and time) (but check the R
  package [ohun](https://docs.ropensci.org/ohun/) for a more thorough
  and friendly implementation)
- Create spectrograms of complete recordings or individual signals
- Run different measures of acoustic signal structure
- Evaluate the performance of measurement methods
- Catalog signals
- Characterize different structural levels in acoustic signals
- Statistical analysis of duet coordination
- Consolidate databases and annotation tables

Most of the functions allow the parallelization of tasks, which
distributes the tasks among several processors to improve computational
efficiency. Tools to evaluate the performance of the analysis at each
step are also available.

## Installing

Install/load the package from CRAN as follows:

``` r
install.packages("warbleR")

# load package
library(warbleR)
```

To install the latest developmental version from
[github](https://github.com/) you will need the R package
[remotes](https://cran.r-project.org/package=remotes):

``` r
remotes::install_github("maRce10/warbleR")

# load package
library(warbleR)
```

## Usage

The package includes several vignettes explaining its main features. The
[Intro to
warbleR](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/articles/warbleR.html)
provides an overview of the package functionalities. The vignette
[Annotation data
format](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/articles/annotation_data_format.html)
gives a detailed description of the required format for input
annotations. There are also three additional [package
vignettes](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/articles/) with examples on
how to organize functions in an acoustic analysis workflow.

A full description of the package (although a bit outdated) can be found
in this [journal
article](https://besjournals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/2041-210X.12624).

## Other packages

The packages [seewave](https://cran.r-project.org/package=seewave) and
[tuneR](https://cran.r-project.org/package=seewave) provide a huge
variety of functions for acoustic analysis and manipulation. They moslty
works on wave objects already imported into the R environment. The
package [baRulho](https://cran.r-project.org/package=baRulho) focuses on
quantifying habitat-induced degradation of acoustic signals with data
inputs and ouputs similar to those of
[warbleR](https://cran.r-project.org/package=warbleR). The package
[Rraven](https://cran.r-project.org/package=Rraven) facilitates the
exchange of data between R and [Raven sound analysis
software](https://www.ravensoundsoftware.com/) ([Cornell Lab of
Ornithology](https://www.birds.cornell.edu/home)) and can be very
helpful for incorporating Raven as the annotating tool into acoustic
analysis workflow in R. The package
[ohun](https://docs.ropensci.org/ohun/) works on automated detection of
sound events, providing functions to diagnose and optimize detection
routines. [dynaSpec](https://cran.r-project.org/package=seewave) is
allows to create dynamic spectrograms (i.e. spectrogram videos).

## Citation

Please cite [warbleR](https://cran.r-project.org/package=warbleR) as
follows:

Araya-Salas, M. and Smith-Vidaurre, G. (2017), *warbleR: an r package to
streamline analysis of animal acoustic signals*. Methods Ecol Evol. 8,
184-191.

NOTE: please also cite the
[tuneR](https://cran.r-project.org/package=tuneR) and
[seewave](https://cran.r-project.org/package=seewave) packages if you
use any spectrogram-creating or acoustic-measuring functions

# Package index

## All functions

- [`acoustic_activity()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/acoustic_activity.md)
  : Estimate acoustic activity across sound files based on selections

- [`by_element_est()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/by_element_est.md)
  : Convert a by-song extended selection table to by-element

- [`catalog()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/catalog.md)
  : Create catalogs of vocal signals

- [`catalog2pdf()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/catalog2pdf.md)
  :

  Combine `catalog` images into pdfs

- [`check_sels()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/check_sels.md)
  : Check selection data frames

- [`check_sound_files()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/check_sound_files.md)
  : Check sound files

- [`color_spectro()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/color_spectro.md)
  : Highlight spectrogram regions

- [`comp_matrix`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/comp_matrix.md)
  :

  Example matrix listing selections to be compared by
  `cross_correlation`

- [`compare_methods()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/compare_methods.md)
  : Assessing the performance of acoustic distance measurements

- [`consolidate()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/consolidate.md)
  : Consolidate (sound) files into a single directory

- [`cross_correlation()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/cross_correlation.md)
  : Time-frequency cross-correlation

- [`cut_sels()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/cut_sels.md)
  : Cut selections into individual sound files

- [`duration_sound_files()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/duration_sound_files.md)
  : Measure the duration of sound files

- [`envelope`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/envelope.md)
  : Calculates the absolute amplitude envelope

- [`filter_sels()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/filter_sels.md)
  : Subset selection data frames based on manually filtered image files

- [`find_clipping()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/find_clipping.md)
  : Find clipped selections

- [`fix_extended_selection_table()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/fix_extended_selection_table.md)
  : Fix extended selection tables

- [`fix_wavs()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/fix_wavs.md)
  : Fix .wav files to allow importing them into R

- [`freq_DTW()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/freq_DTW.md)
  : Acoustic dissimilarity using dynamic time warping on dominant
  frequency contours

- [`freq_range()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/freq_range.md)
  : Detect frequency range iteratively

- [`freq_range_detec()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/freq_range_detec.md)
  : Detect frequency range on wave objects

- [`freq_ts()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/freq_ts.md)
  : Extract frequency contours as time series

- [`full_spectrogram2pdf()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/full_spectrogram2pdf.md)
  :

  `full_spectrogram2pdf` combines `full_spectrograms` images in .jpeg
  format to a single pdf file.

- [`full_spectrograms()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/full_spectrograms.md)
  : Create long spectrograms of entire sound files

- [`gaps()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/gaps.md) : Gap
  duration

- [`image_to_wave()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/image_to_wave.md)
  : Convert images into wave objects

- [`inflections()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/inflections.md)
  : Count number of inflections in a frequency contour

- [`info_sound_files()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/info_sound_files.md)
  : Get sound file parameter information

- [`is_extended_selection_table()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/is_extended_selection_table.md)
  : Class 'extended_selection_table': selection table containing wave
  objects

- [`is_selection_table()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/is_selection_table.md)
  : Class 'selection_table': double-checked frequency/time coordinates
  of selections

- [`lbh_selec_table`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/lbh_selec_table.md)
  : Example data frame of selections (i.e. selection table).

- [`map_xc()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/map_xc.md) :
  Maps of 'Xeno-Canto' recordings by species

- [`mfcc_stats()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/mfcc_stats.md)
  : Calculate descriptive statistics on Mel-frequency cepstral
  coefficients

- [`move_images()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/move_images.md)
  : Move/copy image files between directories

- [`mp32wav()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/mp32wav.md)
  : Convert .mp3 files to .wav

- [`multi_DTW()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/multi_DTW.md)
  :

  A wrapper on [`dtwDist`](https://rdrr.io/pkg/dtw/man/dtwDist.html) for
  comparing multivariate contours

- [`open_wd()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/open_wd.md)
  : Open working directory

- [`overlapping_sels()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/overlapping_sels.md)
  : Find overlapping selections

- [`phylo_spectro()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/phylo_spectro.md)
  : Add spectrograms onto phylogenetic trees

- [`plot_coordination()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/plot_coordination.md)
  : Coordinated singing graphs

- [`query_xc()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/query_xc.md)
  : Access 'Xeno-Canto' recordings and metadata

- [`read_sound_file()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/read_sound_file.md)
  : An extended version of read_wave that reads several sound file
  formats and files from selection tables

- [`read_wave()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/read_wave.md)
  : A wrapper for tuneR's readWave that read sound files listed within
  selection tables

- [`remove_channels()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/remove_channels.md)
  : Remove channels in wave files

- [`remove_silence()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/remove_silence.md)
  : Remove silence in wave files

- [`rename_est_waves()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/rename_est_waves.md)
  : Rename wave objects and associated metadata in extended selection
  tables

- [`resample_est()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/resample_est.md)
  : Resample wave objects in a extended selection table

- [`selection_table()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/selection_table.md)
  : Create 'selection_table' and 'extended_selection_table' objects

- [`sig2noise()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/sig2noise.md)
  : Measure signal-to-noise ratio

- [`sim_coor_sing`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/sim_coor_sing.md)
  : Simulated coordinated singing events.

- [`simulate_songs()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/simulate_songs.md)
  : Simulate animal vocalizations

- [`snr_spectrograms()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/snr_spectrograms.md)
  : Spectrograms with background noise margins

- [`song_analysis()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/song_analysis.md)
  : Calculates acoustic parameters at the song level

- [`sort_colms()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/sort_colms.md)
  : Sort columns in a more intuitive order

- [`sound_pressure_level()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/sound_pressure_level.md)
  : Measure relative sound pressure level

- [`spectro_analysis()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/spectro_analysis.md)
  : Measure acoustic parameters in batches of sound files

- [`spectrograms()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/spectrograms.md)
  : Spectrograms of selected signals

- [`split_sound_files()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/split_sound_files.md)
  : Splits sound files

- [`sth_annotations`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/sth_annotations.md)
  : Example data frame of annotations from a Scale-throated hermit song
  (i.e. selection table).

- [`tailor_sels()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/tailor_sels.md)
  : Interactive view of spectrograms to tailor selections

- [`test_coordination()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/test_coordination.md)
  : Randomization test for singing coordination

- [`track_freq_contour()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/track_freq_contour.md)
  : Spectrograms with frequency measurements

- [`track_harmonic()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/track_harmonic.md)
  : Track harmonic frequency contour

- [`tweak_spectro()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/tweak_spectro.md)
  : Plot a mosaic of spectrograms with varying display parameters

- [`warbleR_options()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/warbleR_options.md)
  : Setting warbleR options

- [`wav_2_flac()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/wav_2_flac.md)
  : Convert .wav files to .flac

- [`waveform_similarity()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/waveform_similarity.md)
  : Pairwise similarity of waveforms

- [`wpd_features()`](https://marce10.github.io/warbleR/reference/wpd_features.md)
  : Measure wavelet packet decomposition features (EXPERIMENTAL)
